reviews.comment:
Un parador como tantos, sus baños muy limpios, sus precios..."saladitos".

(Translated by Google)
A typical inn, its bathrooms very clean, its prices... "a bit steep".
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNScmNLVGNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para prepararse para salir a la ruta lo unico me gustaria que tenga agua caliente para el mate gratis !!!total uno carga nafta y come en el restaurante con eso se paga el agua caliente !!!!

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to get ready for a road trip, the only thing I'd like is free hot water for mate! After all, you fill up with gas and eat at the restaurant, that's enough to pay for the hot water!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSemJlNDB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Ideal para detenerse si estás viajando en familia, comer algo y distender. Detrás de la confitería hay una pequeña plaza con hamacas y sombra, lugar para estacionarae con el auto, mesaa y bancos de cemento, pileta para higienizar alimentos, lavar platos, etc

(Translated by Google)
Ideal for stopping if you're traveling with family, grabbing a bite to eat, and relaxing. Behind the confectionery shop, there's a small plaza with hammocks and shade, parking, cement tables and benches, and a sink for washing food, dishes, etc.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSenZLTHJBRRAB
